lexicon.title: Rhyme Lexicon & Synonyms
lexicon.no_results: Type a word to search for rhymes or synonyms.

studio.empty_lyrics: Your canvas lyrics will show up here as you write them.

canvas.wired_headphones_banner_text: Use wired headphones for a high-quality low-latency recording session

releasing_regret.title: Releasing Regret
releasing_regret.q0: What is one memory or regret from your past that feels like a heavy, withered leaf?
releasing_regret.q1: If you let it drop onto the forest floor, how does the earth promise to decompose and renew it?
releasing_regret.q2: What would your life look like if you stopped holding onto branches that no longer nourish you?
releasing_regret.q3: Write a lyric describing the weight of carrying what has already died.
releasing_regret.q4: What chord progression captures the peaceful release of letting go?

finding_stillness.title: Finding Stillness
finding_stillness.q0: What part of your mind is currently rippled with anxiety, and how can you invite it to settle?
finding_stillness.q1: When you look at the perfect reflection on the water, what true version of yourself do you see?
finding_stillness.q2: If you sat in complete silence by this shore, what is the first feeling that would emerge?
finding_stillness.q3: Describe the texture of absolute quietness using musical terms (tempo, volume, tone).
finding_stillness.q4: Write a line of gratitude for this moment of pause.

growth_after_pain.title: Growth After Pain
growth_after_pain.q0: What personal struggle or heartbreak was the fire that burned your old canvas away?
growth_after_pain.q1: Where do you see the first tiny green shoot of new strength emerging within you?
growth_after_pain.q2: How does ashes fertilizing the soil represent the hidden value of your hardest days?
growth_after_pain.q3: Write a lyric comparing your resilience to a forest growing back stronger.
growth_after_pain.q4: What tempo or rhythm represents a slow, unstoppable rebirth?

embracing_uncertainty.title: Embracing Uncertainty
embracing_uncertainty.q0: What makes you fearful about not being able to see the road far ahead?
embracing_uncertainty.q1: If you could only see three steps in front of you, how would you find the courage to take the next one?
embracing_uncertainty.q2: What comfort does the mysterious, soft fog bring when it covers the noise of the world?
embracing_uncertainty.q3: Write a line about trusting the journey when the destination is hidden.
embracing_uncertainty.q4: What musical key feels like walking into the beautiful unknown?

grief_and_honoring.title: Grief and Honoring
grief_and_honoring.q0: What loss or grief are you carrying that feels frozen inside your chest?
grief_and_honoring.q1: As the sun warms the mountain, how can you allow your frozen tears to melt and flow?
grief_and_honoring.q2: Where does the melting water go, and how can it bring life to the valleys below?
grief_and_honoring.q3: Write a line that honors the beauty of what you lost while accepting that life moves forward.
grief_and_honoring.q4: If your grief was a gentle acoustic melody, how would it resolve?

overcoming_fear.title: Overcoming Fear
overcoming_fear.q0: What is the edge or cliff you are standing on, and what leap of faith are you afraid to take?
overcoming_fear.q1: How does the raw, howling wind challenge you to stand tall in your truth?
overcoming_fear.q2: If you knew the ocean below would catch you and teach you to swim, would you jump?
overcoming_fear.q3: Write a powerful line describing the moment fear turns into freedom.
overcoming_fear.q4: What dynamic shift in a song captures the transition from hesitation to courage?

self_compassion.title: Self-Compassion
self_compassion.q0: In what ways have you been harsh or demanding of yourself during your dry seasons?
self_compassion.q1: How does it feel to finally sit by a cool pool and offer yourself kindness?
self_compassion.q2: If you were speaking to a dear friend who was lost in the desert, what comforting words would you say to them?
self_compassion.q3: Write a gentle verse about soothing your own tired mind.
self_compassion.q4: What soft, warm instrumentation represents a sanctuary of self-love?

reclaiming_voice.title: Reclaiming Voice
reclaiming_voice.q0: What feelings or truths have you silenced in order to keep the peace?
reclaiming_voice.q1: If your voice was a cascading waterfall, what powerful message would it shout to the valley?
reclaiming_voice.q2: How does expressing your raw emotion release the blockages inside you?
reclaiming_voice.q3: Write a lyric that refuses to be quiet or small anymore.
reclaiming_voice.q4: What vocal or instrumental buildup represents reclaiming your personal power?

patience_and_timing.title: Patience and Timing
patience_and_timing.q0: Why are you rushing your healing or your creative process?
patience_and_timing.q1: What do the ancient redwoods teach us about growing slowly and deeply over centuries?
patience_and_timing.q2: How do deep, unseen roots support the tall branches through the heaviest storms?
patience_and_timing.q3: Write a line about the quiet beauty of growing without needing to rush.
patience_and_timing.q4: What slow, grounding tempo represents the rhythm of deep roots?

strength_vulnerability.title: Strength in Vulnerability
strength_vulnerability.q0: How does it feel to stand under the open sky without any armor or hiding spots?
strength_vulnerability.q1: Why is being open to the wind and rain a sign of strength rather than weakness?
strength_vulnerability.q2: If you showed the world your softest, most fragile parts, what beauty would bloom?
strength_vulnerability.q3: Write a lyric about finding strength in being completely exposed and honest.
strength_vulnerability.q4: What instrument represents the fragile yet resilient nature of a wildflower?

navigating_darkness.title: Navigating Darkness
navigating_darkness.q0: When your mind feels dark, what are the tiny stars or points of light that still shine?
navigating_darkness.q1: How does the darkness make the stars visible in a way the bright day never could?
navigating_darkness.q2: What comfort is there in knowing that the night is a natural, temporary phase?
navigating_darkness.q3: Write a verse about finding guidance in your darkest hours.
navigating_darkness.q4: What ambient, spacious sound represents the peace of a starry night?

cleansing_renewal.title: Cleansing and Renewal
cleansing_renewal.q0: What emotional clutter or toxic thoughts do you need the heavy rain to wash away?
cleansing_renewal.q1: How does the air smell and feel after a powerful lightning storm clears the sky?
cleansing_renewal.q2: If the rain could wash off the labels others have put on you, who would you be?
cleansing_renewal.q3: Write a lyric about starting fresh after the storm has passed.
cleansing_renewal.q4: What beat or rhythm captures the refreshing energy of clean rain?

staying_grounded.title: Staying Grounded
staying_grounded.q0: When your thoughts are spinning, how can you draw energy from the solid, unmoving rock beneath you?
staying_grounded.q1: What does it feel like to be completely held and protected by the earth?
staying_grounded.q2: If you could leave your anxieties in the darkness of the cave, what light would you walk back out with?
staying_grounded.q3: Write a line about feeling steady, anchored, and safe in the present moment.
staying_grounded.q4: What deep, low-frequency sound represents the grounding energy of the earth?

feeling_connected.title: Feeling Connected
feeling_connected.q0: In what ways have you isolated yourself, and who are the people you long to fly with?
feeling_connected.q1: How does it feel to realize that your pain is shared by others, and you are not alone?
feeling_connected.q2: What collective song or harmony is created when we support each other's journeys?
feeling_connected.q3: Write a lyric about reaching out your hand in the dark.
feeling_connected.q4: What vocal harmony structure represents perfect connection and support?

accepting_change.title: Accepting Change
accepting_change.q0: What change in your life are you currently fighting or resisting?
accepting_change.q1: How does the river teach us that carving away old rock is necessary to create a beautiful canyon?
accepting_change.q2: If you flowed with the current instead of swimming against it, where would it carry you?
accepting_change.q3: Write a verse about the elegance of letting life reshape you.
accepting_change.q4: What time signature or metric shift represents the natural flow of change?

releasing_anger.title: Releasing Anger
releasing_anger.q0: What anger or resentment has been boiling underneath your surface?
releasing_anger.q1: How can you let the steam rise and vent without burning yourself or others?
releasing_anger.q2: What does it feel like to watch your heated thoughts evaporate into the cool air?
releasing_anger.q3: Write a fiery line that lets out the heat and leaves behind calm water.
releasing_anger.q4: What musical dynamic transition represents a sudden, explosive release of tension?

new_beginnings.title: New Beginnings
new_beginnings.q0: What is one promise you want to make to yourself as a new day begins?
new_beginnings.q1: How does the first golden light breaking over the hills change your perspective?
new_beginnings.q2: If today was a blank sheet of music, what is the first note you would play?
new_beginnings.q3: Write a hopeful lyric about the end of a long, dark night.
new_beginnings.q4: What chord resolving to major represents the first light of dawn?

unconditional_worth.title: Unconditional Worth
unconditional_worth.q0: What makes you believe you need to achieve or perform to have value?
unconditional_worth.q1: How do the mountains exist in quiet majesty without needing to prove anything to anyone?
unconditional_worth.q2: What is your inner peak—the steady, immovable core of your worth?
unconditional_worth.q3: Write a lyric about your value being as solid and unshakeable as a mountain.
unconditional_worth.q4: What grand, orchestral arrangement evokes the scale of unconditional self-worth?

healing_child.title: Healing the Child
healing_child.q0: What did your inner child love to do before the weight of the world took over?
healing_child.q1: If you could play, make mistakes, and create without judgment today, what would you make?
healing_child.q2: What message of safety and love does your adult self want to tell your younger self?
healing_child.q3: Write a playful, lighthearted line that makes you smile.
healing_child.q4: What bright, major-key melody captures the innocence of play?

quiet_strength.title: Quiet Strength
quiet_strength.q0: How do you protect your inner light when the dark storms of life beat against you?
quiet_strength.q1: What does it mean to be a steady guide for yourself and others through rough seas?
quiet_strength.q2: How can you find strength in standing still and just shining your light?
quiet_strength.q3: Write a lyric about being a lighthouse in someone's storm (or your own).
quiet_strength.q4: What steady, repeating rhythm represents the rotating beam of a lighthouse?

collab.invite_title: Invite someone to collaborate with you in this project
collab.confirm_close_title: Are you sure you want to close the collaboration?
collab.confirm_remove_collab_title: Are you sure you want to remove the collaborator(s)?
collab.remove_collab_desc: This will remove the collaborator(s) from this project. They will no longer have access to it.
collab.confirm_leave_collab_title: Are you sure you want to leave the collaboration?
collab.leave_collab_desc: This will remove you from this project. You will lose access to it.
collab.decline_desc: This will decline the invitation and clean the project from your canvas.
collab.close_desc: This will disconnect the project's real-time collaboration. If you are a collaborator, you will leave this project.

connect.no_posts_found: No posts found in this category. Be the first to share!
connect.delete_post_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
connect.delete_comment_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
connect.shared_new_lyric: Shared a new lyric constellation from workspace.

creative.or_start_inspiration: or just start with an inspiration

progress.title: Your progress
progress.subtitle: Complete all 3 goals to reach Level 2
proverbs: Every line written brings you closer to your masterpiece.
Consistency is the key to unlocking your creative genius.
Great songs are not written, they are rewritten.
A single word can spark a whole symphony.
Small steps in songwriting lead to giant leaps in melody.
You are building your legacy, one lyric at a time.
Keep pouring your soul into the canvas; it is paying off.
Crafting art requires patience, and you are doing great.

profile.title: Profile & settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your account details and preferences.
profile.verify_sent: We've sent a verification link to
profile.verify_sent_end: . Please authorize the change in your email client to verify it.
profile.success_desc: Your email address has been updated to
profile.notifications_desc: Receive updates on new modules and masterclass events.
profile.public_profile_desc: Allow other students to see your constellation progress.
profile.error_update_email: Failed to update email. Please try logging in again.

practice.select_theme_desc: Select the emotional anchor for your verses
practice.link_desc: Connect nouns with verbs 1 by 1 (order doesn't matter)
practice.localhost_warning: Make sure the audio stream is running on localhost.

studio_guide.title: Studio Guide
studio_guide.headphone_warning: For the best timing, use wired headphones. Bluetooth may cause recording delay.
studio_guide.env_tip_1: Find a quiet, carpeted room (avoid echo)
studio_guide.env_tip_2: Close windows & shut down background fans/AC
studio_guide.tech_tip_1: Position mic 10-15 cm from your mouth
studio_guide.tech_tip_2: Set level so peaks don't clip (avoid red zone)
studio_guide.equip_tip_2: Choose a high-quality USB/XLR condenser mic

studio_banner.warning_text: For the best timing, use wired headphones. Bluetooth may cause recording delay.
studio_banner.before_you_record_sub: You do not need professional equipment to use Demo Studio. Your device's built-in microphone is enough to get started.
studio_banner.tip_headphones_desc: Headphones prevent the previously recorded tracks and metronome from being recorded again through your microphone.
studio_banner.tip_wired_desc: Bluetooth headphones can create noticeable delay while recording. For better timing, use headphones connected with a cable.
studio_banner.tip_mic_desc: Before recording, make sure Demo Studio is using the microphone you want to record with.
studio_banner.tip_quiet_desc: Background noise and room echo will become part of your recording. A quiet room with curtains, furniture, or other soft surfaces usually sounds better.
studio_banner.tip_pos_desc: Stay close enough to get a clear sound, but not so close that the recording becomes distorted.
studio_banner.tip_apps_desc: Closing other audio, video, or browser applications can improve performance and reduce interruptions.
studio_banner.recommended_setup_sub: For a simple and reliable recording setup, we recommend:
studio_banner.higher_quality_note: For higher-quality recordings, you can use an audio interface with a microphone or instrument connected to it.
studio_banner.about_bluetooth_desc: Bluetooth headphones are useful for listening, but they are not recommended while recording. Bluetooth introduces latency, which means you may hear the sound slightly later than you play or sing.
